questions.hindi: यह काम कल पूरा किया जाएगा।
questions.english: This work will be completed tomorrow.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Object + will be / can be / should be / must be + V3 (past participle)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This work will be completed tomorrow."
questions.category: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals practice

questions.hindi: इस समस्या को हल किया जा सकता है।

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This problem can be solved."
